329],[241,602,1776530778341],[252,591,1776530778353],[264,580,1776530778364],[274,568,1776530778378],[283,558,1776530778391],[290,549,1776530778403],[295,542,1776530778418],[298,538,1776530778432],[299,536,1776530778449],[300,535,1776530778460],[300,534,1776530778475],[301,533,1776530778488],[301,532,1776530778505],[302,531,1776530778517],[303,530,1776530778535],[303,528,1776530778549],[304,527,1776530778556],[305,525,1776530778574],[305,524,1776530778582],[306,524,1776530778600],[307,524,1776530778622],[308,524,1776530778637],[309,524,1776530778653],[310,524,1776530778679],[311,525,1776530778698],[310,525,1776530778718],[309,524,1776530778732],[308,523,1776530778741],[307,522,1776530778769],[306,522,1776530778780],[305,521,1776530778792],[304,521,1776530778807],[303,520,1776530778812],[302,520,1776530778830],[302,519,1776530778837]],"mm-mp":19.099408284023667,"md":[[304,525,1776530778591]],"md-mp":3541.75,"mu":[[304,525,1776530778703]],"mu-mp":3555.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
